text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 107 

ICU_IND_CD 

LABEL: Intensive Care Unit (ICU) Indicator Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating that the beneficiary has spent time in the intensive care unit (ICU) during the stay. It 
also specifies the type of ICU. 

SHORT NAME: ICUINDCD 

LONG NAME: ICU_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = General (revenue center 0200) 
1 = Surgical (revenue center 0201)
